title: polystichum rigidum var. australe
intro: Polystichum rigidum var. australe, also known as the Mountain Wood Fern, is a variety of fern that is native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its use as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as colds, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The medicinal properties of Polystichum rigidum var. australe can be prepared through herbal infusions, tinctures, or salves, which are often used to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes.
